view.title: Validate explicit UC need #8
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for aggregate reporting and trends.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 8 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for aggregate reporting and trends.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for aggregate reporting and trends.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Aggregate reporting and trends', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. While there are mentions of NPS improvements and operational insights in the linked use case, these do not constitute direct evidence of aggregate reporting capabilities. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of specific evidence supporting the requirement.
